audit.summary: Ruma Rooftop has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: phone path is not obvious enough.

findings.title: Phone path is not obvious enough
findings.evidence: The captured page text/link data does not show a clear phone action.
findings.fix: Make call/quote actions persistent in the hero and mobile header.

findings.title: Core services are not instantly clear
findings.evidence: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Restaurant.
findings.fix: Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes.

findings.title: Page is hard to scan
findings.fix: Add clear section headings for services, proof, service area, and final CTA.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: The captured page text/link data does not show a clear phone action.
proofPoints: 113 Google reviews listed in Maps scrape
coldMessageDraft: Hey Ruma, I was looking at Ruma Rooftop in Brisbane. I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: The captured page text/link data does not show a clear phone action. I made a quick note on what I would tighten first; happy to send it over if useful.
followUpDraft: Quick follow-up on Ruma Rooftop: the main opportunity I noticed is Make call/quote actions persistent in the hero and mobile header.. Worth me sending the short audit?
guardrails: This is a draft, not a final send.

Do not claim Google API verification until it has been run.
Find email/contact path only after operator accepts the offer angle.
